offer: For small property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual report preparation causes late financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Time-consuming preparation of quarterly financial reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on financial reporting
DM outreach to small property managers with demo
Community forums for sharing property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with potential users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
